headline: TKO Group (TKO) Growth Outlook Supported by UFC and Zuffa Boxing Expansion
summary: TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:TKO) ranks among the best growth stocks to buy and hold for the long term. Following the company’s fourth-quarter results, Bernstein SocGen Group reiterated its Outperform rating and $250 price target for TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:TKO) on February 27. The company reported an EPS of -$0.08, which was much lower […]
